questions.question_text_full:
Select the most appropriate direct form of the given sentence.
My brother told me that I could see any film I wanted on TV.

options.text: My brother said to me, “You could see any film you wanted on TV.”
My brother said to me, “I could see any film I wanted on TV.”
My brother said to me, “I can see any film I want on TV.”
My brother said to me, “You can see any film you want on TV.”

questions.correct_option_text: My brother said to me, “You can see any film you want on TV.”

questions.question_text_full:
Select the most appropriate indirect form of the given sentence.
Amit said to me, “Your parents are waiting for you.”

options.text: Amit told me that his parents were waiting for me.
Amit told me that your parents are waiting for you.
Amit told me that my parents were waiting for me.
Amit asked me if my parents were waiting for me.

questions.correct_option_text: Amit told me that my parents were waiting for me.

questions.question_text_full:
Select the most appropriate option to fill in the blanks.
________ cart loaded with mangoes turned upside down on ________ main road.

Parts of the following sentence are given as options. Identify the segment that contains a grammatical error.
I shall buy this book if you like it or not.
